name: gh-summary-slack-bot
description: Slack slash command that summarizes GitHub PRs using Claude AI

scripts.deploy: [ -f .env ] && PROVIDER=$(grep '^PROVIDER=' .env | cut -d'=' -f2) && if [ "$PROVIDER" = "aws" ]; then npm run deploy:aws; elif [ "$PROVIDER" = "vercel" ] || [ -z "$PROVIDER" ]; then npm run deploy:vercel; else echo 'Unknown PROVIDER="$PROVIDER" in .env. Use "vercel" or "aws".'; fi
